note: Advisory sandbox linter. CHECK_OK/DANGLING vocab, never PASS.
title: Registry cross-consistency linter

subject.method: read-only; checks referential integrity of motor/agent id references

what_it_proves: real registries: all references (conflicts_with, allowed_motors, conflict_matrix.motors) resolve to a known motor or agent -> CHECK_OK exit 0
universe = registry motors + agent_lanes + inventory-declared workflow/mac motor ids (avoids false positives on the curated SG subset)
seeded dangling ref (one field) is caught and named
CLI exits 1 on a dangling ref, 0 when clean (RED-before-GREEN, not always-exit-0)
chess_patches_applied: linter exits NONZERO on any hit; proves RED-before-GREEN on a seeded bad ref
read-only; no registry writes; append-only respected
